hero.headline: Reduce expired-kit risk and simplify audit preparation.
hero.subhead: Monitor every kit, prevent expiry incidents, and streamline compliance across all centres.

modules.title: We use SafetySight for…
modules.subline: Core modules that make kit compliance simple and repeatable.

cards.title: Kit Scanning
cards.desc: Scan, log, and verify contents in seconds—works offline.

cards.title: Audit Logs
cards.desc: Complete evidence trail for every check.

cards.title: Readiness Dashboard
cards.desc: Centre & room visibility at a glance.

customer_context.headline: Customer Example
customer_context.body: A multi-site customer struggled with manual checks and spreadsheets. SafetySight replaced paper processes, centralised records, and automated expiry alerts to improve consistency and audit readiness.

problem.title: Before SafetySight
bullets: Paper and Excel for kit checks.
Hours lost to audit prep and chasing receipts.

solution.title: After SafetySight
solution.lead: From chaotic audits to stronger day-to-day readiness.
benefits: Scan kits quickly and record evidence instantly.
Automated expiry alerts to reduce expired items.
Managers see centre health in a single dashboard.
Pull audit‑ready reports with minimal effort.

transformation.headline: Make compliance a daily habit, not a once‑a‑year scramble
steps: Scan — QR or barcode scan per kit.
Track — Items, lot numbers and expiries tracked automatically.
Audit — Instant evidence exports for assessors.

features.title: Kit Scanning
features.desc: Scan a kit and log contents in seconds, even offline.

features.title: Expiry Alerts
features.desc: Predictive alerts so you replace early, not late.

features.title: Training & SOPs
features.desc: Quick micro‑courses and one‑tap SOP access.

features.title: Integrations & API
features.desc: Sync with rostering, procurement, and asset systems.

how_it_works: Tag & scan — Put a QR on each kit, scan with the app.
Report & prove — Export reports for audits or regulators.

sustainment.headline: Compliance that lasts
bullets: Simple workflows educators follow without training fatigue.
Alerts and checklists that build routine.
sustainment.quote: It’s no longer up to memory. Every kit follows the same standard. — Lead Educator

pricing_tease: Start small, scale fast. Pilot a single centre or roll out across your entire network. Pricing scales with centres, not complicated per‑feature tiers.

bottom_cta.headline: Ready to reduce expired kits and prepare for audits with confidence?

footer: We respect privacy. No spam. Customer Success assists with adoption.
styling_guidelines: Keep paragraphs to 2–4 lines on mobile.
Bold numbers and use them as primary visual anchors.
Use simple verbs: track, scan, alert, verify, report, improve.
